$schema_comment: Canonical list of installable components for a future parent-facing installer. Keep in sync with requirements*.txt and README. Do not offer dev-only packages to parents.

core.parent_summary: Avatar app + backend. Works with cloud AI and browser voices/mic.

app: app npm dependencies / packaged Electron build
install.notes: Always installed. No large model downloads by itself.

components.parent_summary: Friendly neural speech so the avatar sounds less robotic. Recommended.
components.approx_size: ~300MB model download on first use (+ pip packages)

install.notes: If the machine only has Python 3.13+, install/bundled runtime must be 3.12 when kokoro_tts is selected.

system_optional.why: Helps Kokoro pronounce some words; often optional on Windows

components.parent_summary: Understand the child’s speech on this PC instead of relying only on the browser. Optional; larger download.
components.approx_size: Model size depends on choice (tiny→large); often hundreds of MB

install.notes: Not fully wired as the default STT path yet; still offer in installer so parents can pre-install for upcoming local STT.

components.parent_summary: Run the tutor on this computer with no cloud API key. Needs disk space and a decent PC/Mac.
components.approx_size: Ollama app + model (e.g. 4–8GB+ for a 7B model)
components.fallback_if_skipped: Cloud / hybrid mode with parent API key

components.parent_summary: Smart replies via OpenRouter / OpenAI / Gemini. Uses the internet; set a daily budget.
components.notes: Not a pip package — installer step to collect/store key in config.local.json (never commit).

components.parent_summary: Call the avatar by name hands-free. Coming soon — reserve space in the installer UI.

install.notes: Do not install a package yet. When wired, add dependency here and to requirements-optional.txt.

required_setup_steps.parent_summary: Protects grown-up settings and computer-use approval. Required — no default PIN in installed builds.
required_setup_steps.notes: Dev/run-from-source default is 1234 (see README). Installer must collect a PIN (min 4 digits) and store it hashed via set_pin().

installer_ui_notes: Show parent_label + parent_summary; never show raw pip names as the primary text.
Show approx_size and whether a download happens on first run.
Core is always on and not uncheckable.
If kokoro_tts is unchecked, still ship enhanced browser TTS (no extra install).
Dev packages (pytest, Playwright, requirements-dev.txt) must NOT appear in the parent installer.
After install, run probe_speech_capabilities() / hardware detect and show a simple Ready checklist.
